data.title: Live Updates: Latest from Israel, Iran, and Middle East | The Jerusalem Post
data.description: US strikes Iranian tankers violating Hormuz blockade • UAE activates air defense system amid renewed Iranian attacks • Russia reportedly smuggling drone parts to Iran through Caspian Sea
